---
name: Site Support Request
about: Request support for a new streaming site
title: "[SITE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is there a specific streaming site you'd like to see supported?**
Please provide the name and URL of the site.

**What is the site's URL structure?**
If possible, provide examples of show and episode URLs (e.g., `https://example.com/watch/12345/s1e1`).

**Does the site show a TMDB ID in the URL or page?**
If so, please specify where.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the site here.
